query: SELECT id, subject, code, title, status FROM curriculumTopics WHERE (subject='Math' AND (code LIKE 'Math 14%' OR code LIKE 'Math 15%' OR code LIKE 'Math 16%' OR code LIKE 'Math 17%')) OR (subject='ELA') ORDER BY subject, ord LIMIT 40;
